content.observe: You're not just a body moving through this world anymore. You're a process — an identity, a state, a place in memory, a point of execution.
content.fault: Something asked what you are, and you had no answer. A process without a defined state can't be scheduled, can't be tracked, can't exist properly.

hotspots.label: Process ID
hotspots.detail: A unique identifier the OS uses to track this process among all others.

hotspots.label: Process State
hotspots.detail: New, ready, running, waiting, or terminated — where the process currently stands.

hotspots.label: Program Counter
hotspots.detail: The address of the next instruction this process will execute.

hotspots.label: Memory Image
hotspots.detail: The code, data, and stack that belong to this process alone.
